name: Monterey Fondue
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Canned whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim crusts from bread.
2. Spread bread with butter, then cut slices in halves.
3. Arrange half of bread slices in a greased shallow 3-quart baking dish.
4. Cover with half of corn.
5. Seed chiles, cut into strips and arrange half of chile strips over corn.
6. Sprinkle with half of cheese.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Combine eggs, milk, and salt in a bowl.
9. Pour the mixture over the ingredients in the casserole dish.
10. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or longer.
11. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until puffy and brown.
